## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance metrics show positive trends: sessions up to 4,800+, Google traffic remains high](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [New content opportunities shared; Paul approved \~80% of suggested topics](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [UX improvements needed for FAQ sections on integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Octave integration pending finalization; Atlas artifacts to be updated once complete](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics Review

  - [Sessions increased to over 4,800 in the past week](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Google traffic remains the highest referrer](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic has lagged for the past two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Non-branded traffic increasing (GSC data only available until April)](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Conversion events: increase in form submissions and HubSpot-related events](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Integration pages: slight drop in sessions, not yet surpassing May highs](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [5 competitor pages ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New content opportunities shared; Paul approved majority with feedback](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Plan to optimize older content for better LLM referrals (e.g., using questions as H2s)](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Considering refreshing existing content for duplicate/similar topics](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### UX Improvements

  - [FAQ sections on integration pages need better spacing and clickability](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Example of good FAQ UX shared from Ramp's website](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Action item: Create issue for Notum to fix FAQ spacing and cursor behavior](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Octave Integration

  - [Victor and Matteo to finalize by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Atlas artifacts to be updated once integration details are received](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Social Media Distribution

  - [Golzar inquired about streamlining social media distribution workflow](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Current process: GPT + Google Sheets + manual CSV upload](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [GrowthX team to explore potential solutions and share suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

### Scrunch Integration

  - [Work in progress to integrate Scrunch (AI mentions/LLM tracking tool)](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Walkthrough planned once integration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/kipFh3-KN5TUq8Nz7jZLbZSfgfJGtiKp?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

## Next Steps

  - Review and provide feedback on competitor pages in Airtable
  - Create issue for Notum to improve FAQ UX on integration pages
  - Finalize Octave integration details (Victor and Matteo)
  - GrowthX to explore social media distribution workflow options for Strapi
  - Continue optimizing older content for better LLM referrals
  - Proceed with approved new content topics (\~80% of suggestions)
  - Complete Scrunch integration and schedule walkthrough
